method.stream_probe: ffprobe with 10-second read timeout and bounded process timeout
method.playback_probe: 5-second FFmpeg decode; a candidate is not accepted without a valid video frame
method.identity_check: sample video frames were checked for channel watermark/identity; interruption pages and wrong logos fail
method.publication_rule: private credential-bearing URLs are never published; token/signed-query URLs are allowed only when directly extracted from a public source catalog with provenance and current playback plus identity verification
method.geo_blocked_fallback_rule: A user-approved VPN/geo-blocked fallback may be published when no better exact candidate passes current playback checks; append (Geo-blocked) to the normal display name and record the access note.

Channel 8.identity_evidence: Fresh playable label-matched candidates showed Channel 8 Thailand, Russia/MIR, or other non-Singapore station branding; none matched Singapore 8频道.
Channel 8.official_constraint: page metadata marks Encryption=True and Territory=Singapore (VPN ON); browser-loaded media is DRM/HDCP protected
Channel 8.catalog_refresh: 82/82 active public catalogs returned HTTP 200 at 2026-07-20T05:24:25Z
Channel 8.action: kept withheld; no safe Geo-blocked fallback

Channel U.identity_evidence: Three current frames showed the U watermark, Chinese programming, Singapore phone 6373 9898, wondershop.sg, and SGD pricing; the earlier HD branch showed Shenzhen TV and was rejected.
Channel U.official_constraint: official page metadata marks Encryption=True and Territory=Singapore (VPN ON); selected fallback is non-DRM and has no query string or user credentials
